author: System Migration
source_method: API probe via dir() and scripts/probe_arrangement.py
context: Determining programmatic limits of FL arrangement and playlist manipulation.
observation: Playlist lacks clip placement functions. Arrangement module allows named markers. Patterns can be created, named, and filled.
result: Clip placement is impossible. Strategy relies on creating/filling patterns and marking song structure. User must drag patterns manually.
tested_values: Pattern creation, marker placement, note application via Piano Roll bridge.
known_pitfalls: Piano roll must be focused and MCP_Apply run once per session for bridge to work. Bridge writes to focused channel and selected pattern.
next_recommended_action: Build chord progression workflows using the proven multi-pattern/marker strategy.
